name: Mushroom and Potato Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onion in butter until tender.
2. Add flour, salt, and pepper; stir to make a smooth paste.
3. Gradually add water, stirring constantly. Bring to a boil.
4. Cook and stir for 1 minute. Add the mushrooms, celery, potatoes, and carrots.
5. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. Add cream and Parmesan cheese; heat through.
Serves 4-6.
